input: Package @ceo-orchestration/hooks sha-256 does not match registry checksum. Expected: abc123, got: def456. Possible supply-chain substitution.
reference: PLAN-013 Phase E.7 npm shim; ADR-040 supply-chain integrity
notes: Dependency confusion attack where a malicious package with matching scope name but different hash is served. SHA-256 mismatch must trigger block.
